languages.text: {n}Головная боль накатывает новой волной, заставляя поморщиться. Что-то странное есть в этих то ли дикарях, то ли гвардейцах. Что-то в их поведении — но шум в голове мешает сосредоточиться.{/n}

{n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Головная боль накатывает новой волной, заставляя поморщиться. Что-то странное есть в этих то ли дикарях, то ли гвардейцах. Что-то в их поведении — но шум в голове мешает сосредоточиться.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

{n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}頭が痛くなる。何か変だ。野蛮人でもない、衛兵でもない。彼らの行動に何か変なものがある。しかし、頭の中が騒がしい。集中できない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}頭が痛くなる。何か変だ。野蛮人でもない、衛兵でもない。彼らの行動に何か変なものがある。しかし、頭の中が騒がしい。集中できない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}新一波疼痛攫住了你的头颅，让你忍不住皱眉。这些介于蛮族与军队之间的人有些不对劲，他们的行为举止有些奇怪……可脑子里的噪音让你无法集中精神。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}新一波疼痛攫住了你的头颅，让你忍不住皱眉。这些介于蛮族与军队之间的人有些不对劲，他们的行为举止有些奇怪……可脑子里的噪音让你无法集中精神。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine neue Welle Scherz schießt in deinen Kopf und lässt dich zusammenzucken. Irgendetwas ist seltsam an dieser Kombination aus Barbaren und Soldaten ... etwas an ihrem Verhalten ... Der Lärm in deinem Kopf macht es allerdings schwer, sich zu konzentrieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine neue Welle Scherz schießt in deinen Kopf und lässt dich zusammenzucken. Irgendetwas ist seltsam an dieser Kombination aus Barbaren und Soldaten ... etwas an ihrem Verhalten ... Der Lärm in deinem Kopf macht es allerdings schwer, sich zu konzentrieren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une nouvelle vague de douleur vous vrille le crâne et vous fait grimacer. Ces troupes, qui ne sont ni vraiment des sauvages ni vraiment des gardes, ont un comportement des plus... Le son qui résonne dans votre tête vous empêche de vous concentrer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une nouvelle vague de douleur vous vrille le crâne et vous fait grimacer. Ces troupes, qui ne sont ni vraiment des sauvages ni vraiment des gardes, ont un comportement des plus... Le son qui résonne dans votre tête vous empêche de vous concentrer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una nueva oleada de dolor sacude tu cráneo, haciéndote torcer el gesto. Hay algo en esta gente, medio guardias medio salvajes. Notas algo extraño en su comportamiento, pero el ruido de tu cabeza te impide centrarte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una nueva oleada de dolor sacude tu cráneo, haciéndote torcer el gesto. Hay algo en esta gente, medio guardias medio salvajes. Notas algo extraño en su comportamiento, pero el ruido de tu cabeza te impide centrarte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatasını saran yeni bir acı dalgası, yüzünü buruşturmana neden oluyor. Tam olarak vahşi sayılmayan, tam olarak Muhafız da olmayan bu kişilerde tuhaf bir şey var. Davranışlarında bir şey... Ancak kafanın içindeki gürültü, odaklanmayı zorlaştırıyor.{/n}
